## Summary

What should be added or improved?

## Motivation

Why does this help the simulator, research workflow, or repo usability?

## Proposed Design

Describe the expected API, behavior, or artifact changes.

## Alternatives Considered

List simpler or competing approaches if relevant.

## Additional Context

Include links, papers, traces, or examples.
